_comment: Playtester Card-Action-Datenbank. 'prints' = alle SetCode-Number Kombinationen (inkl. int Prints). 'action' = ID der JS-Funktion die ausgeführt wird.

abilities.description: Discard a Basic Energy from hand, draw 3 cards
Look at top 2 cards, take 1 to hand, put other on bottom

trainers.description: Switch opponent's bench Pokémon to active position
